generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Position encoder mounted directly on motor for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance GearboxPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind gearbox for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"
    DTDFVocab:producedData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

    base:desc "Sensor measuring torque for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"

    base:desc "Sensor measuring angular velocity for the first axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot"

]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

]

]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [

]

]

instance GearboxPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:fromData GearboxPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [

]

instance TorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [

instance AngularVelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [

    DTDFVocab:fromData AngularVelocityDataTransmitted

    base:desc "Simulated friction data from Coulomb-Viscous model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CoulombViscousSimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler
]

instance StribeckSimulatedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated friction data from Stribeck model"
    DTDFVocab:fromData StribeckSimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler

    DTDFVocab:fromData DahlSimulatedDataTransmitted

    DTDFVocab:fromData LuGreSimulatedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulinkSimulationEnabler

instance SysMLModelingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML modeling tool for structural modeling of industrial robot axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance SimulinkSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink simulation tool for friction models"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShellEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data traceability and asset management"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance MQTTDataStreamingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, VisualizationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslControllerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for robot motion control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyEnhancementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard tool for integrated visualization of robot data and simulation results"
    DTDFVocab:enables VisualizationService
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelIdentificationInsight
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Integrated visualization of robot data and simulation results in unified dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyEnhancementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enhancement of robot motion accuracy through model-based control adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:provides ControlParameterAdjustmentAction
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification leading to adjustments in robot control parameters for improved motion accuracy"
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot motion and friction behavior for operational insights"
]

instance ControlParameterAdjustmentAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic adjustment of robot control parameters based on friction model identification results"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance MABIMAX100Axis1Environment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot system"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor in MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Gearwheel component in MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox in MABI MAX 100 robot first axis"
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A purpose-driven digital shadow structured per the Digital Shadow Reference Model, integrating physical sensors, data traces processed by simulation models, and visualization dashboard for friction analysis of the robot's first axis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated phase, utilizing live operational data for continuous friction model identification during robot operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Comparison of simulated vs. measured data to identify friction discrepancies, multi-physics-aware integration of white-box and black-box models for enhanced accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time data streaming from physical sensors to the digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) and SysML for modeling standards."
]
